findings.summary: NUMDAM does not host Funkcialaj Ekvacioj backlist; the prior R5-OKAMOTO-PROJECT-EUCLID-RETRY agent's recommendation that NUMDAM hosts FE was incorrect.

evidence.numdam_journal_list_scan: Full https://www.numdam.org/journals/?lang=en listing scanned (~50 journals, primarily French mathematics: Annales de l'Institut Fourier, Bulletin SMF, Compositio Mathematica, Publications IHÉS, etc.). No Funkcialaj Ekvacioj entry.
evidence.numdam_root_funkcial_match: No 'funkcial' substring match in NUMDAM root HTML.

findings.disposition: Recorded so future literature-acquisition prompts do not waste cycles on NUMDAM for Japanese math journals. The correct OA route for Funkcialaj Ekvacioj is the Kobe University journal site directly: http://fe.math.kobe-u.ac.jp/FE/ (operator-surfaced).
findings.synthesizer_arbitration_request: None. Operator's URL identification immediately resolved the acquisition; the NUMDAM mis-recommendation is now corrected in the bridge record. Future R5-style prompts targeting Japanese math journals (FE, J. Math. Soc. Japan, Proc. Japan Acad., etc.) should try the publishing institution's direct site first before NUMDAM/Project Euclid.

findings.summary: Okamoto FE 30 (1987) Part IV uses W(B_2) affine Weyl framework; CC-VQUAD-PIII-NORMALIZATION-MAP relies on the W(D_6) framing of more recent literature (slot 08 Barhoumi-Lisovyy-Miller-Prokhorov 2024 / SIGMA 2024).

evidence.okamoto_1987_root_system_quote: Section 2.1 of the title page table of contents reads 'Root system' under '§2 Transformation group of P_{III'}'; abstract states 'G_* is isomorphic to the affine Weyl group of the root system of the type B_2'.

findings.disposition: Cross-walking the B_2 / D_6 affine-Weyl conventions is a part of the M6 closure's mapping work. This is NOT a blocker; both conventions describe the same Painlevé III modulo a known type-correspondence. Note flagged for the M6 prompt drafter so the cross-walk is built into the closure plan rather than discovered mid-execution.
findings.synthesizer_arbitration_request: None. Informational note for M6 prompt drafting: include explicit B_2 -> D_6 / D_8 confluence cross-walk as a sub-step of CC-VQUAD-PIII-NORMALIZATION-MAP; cite Okamoto 1987 for the canonical Hamiltonian Lax pair and Barhoumi-Lisovyy-Miller-Prokhorov 2024 for the D_6 monodromy data.
